title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Technician Posts
description: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has declared the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Technician Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of applciation. If...
